inclusionCriteria: Listed only if: (a) formally declared or has an exploratory committee, OR (b) is the subject of sustained national 2028 coverage/polling AND holds or has held major office or a major-party nomination. Bare FEC filings do NOT qualify (hundreds exist, incl. pseudonyms). Statuses: speculative -> exploratory -> declared -> suspended -> nominee. Review monthly; statusAsOf per entry. sources[] holds first-person text URLs; per-URL descriptions in PROVENANCE.md.

candidates.name: Kristi Noem
candidates.note: Former SD governor; DHS Secretary 2025-26 (departed March 2026)

candidates.name: Greg Abbott
candidates.note: Running for a 4th term in Nov 2026

candidates.name: Ron DeSantis
candidates.note: Term-limited; leaves office January 2027. Included in national 2028 GOP primary polling (Emerson May 2026, RCP average).

candidates.name: Ted Cruz
candidates.note: Included in RCP 2028 national polling average with recurring 2028-framed coverage.

candidates.name: Nikki Haley
candidates.note: Former SC governor, UN ambassador, 2024 primary runner-up; included in national 2028 GOP polling fields.

candidates.name: Kamala Harris
candidates.note: Former VP; 2024 nominee. Said April 2026 she is 'thinking about' 2028; declined 2026 CA governor run.

candidates.name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
candidates.note: Reported organizational steps toward a run; also weighing a 2028 NY Senate bid; no committee for either.

candidates.name: Pete Buttigieg
candidates.note: Former Transportation Secretary; passed on 2026 Michigan races

candidates.name: Gretchen Whitmer
candidates.note: Termed out January 2027. Said she would not run, then walked it back; no definitive withdrawal on record.

candidates.name: Josh Shapiro
candidates.note: Running for reelection Nov 2026; included in national 2028 Democratic polling (Emerson May 2026).

candidates.name: JB Pritzker
candidates.note: Seeking a third term Nov 2026; sustained national 2028-framed coverage.

candidates.name: Andy Beshear
candidates.note: Term ends Dec 2027; openly considering a run, early-state travel, included in national polling; no committee.

candidates.name: Ruben Gallego
candidates.note: Says of 2028 'we have to look at it'; early-state travel and repeated national coverage.

candidates.name: Rahm Emanuel
candidates.note: Former Chicago mayor, WH chief of staff, ambassador to Japan; openly mulling a run with early-state visits.

candidates.name: Jo Jorgensen
candidates.note: 2020 Libertarian nominee; May 2026 exploratory committee, no upgrade found as of July 2026
